title: Kits+
description: Save and load your own kits with just a few clicks – perfect for Creator and PvP servers. Kits+ allows players to create, save, and retrieve custom equipment at any time, whether for duels or other battles.
body:
kits+ is a simple and fast Minecraft plugin that lets players save their kits and reload them at any time. It's ideal for PvP servers, training servers, or game modes where players often want to start with the same items.


kits+ is a simple and fast Minecraft plugin that lets players save their kits and reload them at any time. It's ideal for PvP servers, training servers, or game modes where players often want to start with the same items.





... ✨ Features:

1. Save Kits – Save your current inventory as a kit

2. Load Kits – Load your saved kits with a single command

3. Multiple Kits – Create and manage different kits

4. Lightweight – Minimal impact on server performance

5. Easy to Use – Clear and intuitive commands

📜 Example Commands:

/kit save <name> – Saves your current inventory as a kit

/kit load <name> – Loads a saved kit

/kit delete <name> – Deletes a kit

/kit list – Displays all available kits

🎯 Perfect for:

PvP Servers,
Practice/Training Servers,
Minigame Servers,
Private Servers with Friends
